Might Hero. Upon leveling up, most of the time gains Attack and Defense bonuses, along with skills that strengthen this hero’s creatures. Knows Heroic Strike, which is used to attack the enemies in battle. This skill’s Damage scales with the hero’s level.

Magic Hero. Upon leveling up, most of the time gains Spell Power and Knowledge bonuses, along with skills that enhance spellcasting. Knows Heroic Strike, which is used to attack the enemies in battle. This skill’s Damage scales with the hero’s level.
